channel.title: Austin's Investment Brief
channel.itunes:author: Austin Lansing
channel.description: Daily portfolio, news, and market-aware investment brief, synthesized from newsletters and live holdings. Personal use only.

item.title: Daily Investment Brief — May 12, 2026
item.description: Ceasefire dying into CPI week; Trump-Xi summit Thursday; Warsh trade unwinding. Test episode generated from a backfilled brief — narration based on the existing brief structure (tables stripped), so this one is missing the prose-narrated tables that future briefs will include.

item.title: Daily Investment Brief — May 12, 2026 (v2 — TTS-optimized script)
item.description: Same brief as v1 but with acronyms expanded (CPI → consumer price index, BoA → Bank of America, PLA → People's Liberation Army, etc.), numbers verbalized, and tables narrated in prose. This is the format future briefs will use automatically.

item.title: Daily Investment Brief — May 15, 2026
item.description: **Sources:** 50 newsletters (May 13–15) | **Wiki context:** 20 theme pages, 6 thinker profiles, 8 entity pages **Portfolio:** ~CA$1.58M gross / ~CA$1.45M net (May 15 live prices) | Concentrated resources/commodities | Barbell strategy **HG concentration:** ~76% gross / ~83% net | **Margin utilizat
